name: Westin Acquisition Corp
business: Westin Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities. It has not identified any specific business combination target and has not engaged any agent to identify or locate a suitable acquisition candidate. The company will not undertake an initial business combination with any company based in or having the majority of its operations in Greater China.
